invariants: The node graph is acyclic and every dependency resolves.
Every completed installed node has a matching hashed output artifact.
Every installed node is selected or required by the pinned recipe and matches the pinned catalog skill version.
Every resolved installed skill has exactly one catalog-matching recipe version pin.
MarketViewSemanticsV1 precedes CreatorExpressionPlanV1; post and viewpoint data are parallel descendants of that plan.
ViewpointVisualV1 descends from both CreatorExpressionPlanV1 and ViewpointDataBundleV1.
Every selected static direction registers exactly one 2488 x 1056 publication master and passes phone-scale inspection before ViewpointVisualV1 is frozen.

ResearchPackV1, CreatorExpressionPlanV1, ViewpointDataBundleV1, and PublishCandidateSetV1 registry entries carry normalized quality decision, artifact state, and unresolved material request count summaries.

A ready, running, or completed render/candidate descendant has only release-safe gate-bearing ancestors with zero unresolved material requests; registry locators are never dereferenced to decide this.
Source-only non-trade runs may omit TradeLogicProfileV1, TradingThesisV1, and SettlementClaimV1.
Every current node state folds from append-only state events.
Approvals bind exact artifact IDs and hashes.
Release readiness is distinct from verified publication.
Content performance and investment outcomes remain separate.
